name: first-call-exterior-cleaning
description: First Call Exterior Cleaning - Cape Coral, FL

scripts.watch: node -e "const{watch}=require('fs');const{exec}=require('child_process');['src','includes'].forEach(d=>{watch(d,{recursive:true},()=>{exec('node build.js',(_,o,e)=>{process.stdout.write(o);if(e)process.stderr.write(e)})})});console.log('Watching src/ and includes/ for changes...')"
